# Fabrk - Next.js 15 SaaS Boilerplate
> 100+ production-ready components, auth, payments, multi-tenancy

## Documentation
- /CLAUDE.md - AI agent guidance
- /.agent-workspace/CLAUDE.md - Detailed patterns and architecture

## Quick Start
npm install && npm run dev

## Tech Stack
Next.js 15, TypeScript, Prisma, NextAuth v5, Stripe/Polar

## Project Structure
- src/app/ - Next.js App Router pages and API routes
- src/components/ - React components (ui/, landing/, settings/, etc.)
- src/lib/ - Utilities, auth, database, email, payments
- prisma/ - Database schema and migrations

## Key Features
- Authentication (OAuth, Magic Link, Credentials)
- Multi-tenancy with organizations
- Stripe/Polar payments integration
- File uploads (S3-compatible)
- Email system with templates
- Rate limiting and security
- Audit logging
- Feature flags

## Component Categories
- UI primitives (Button, Input, Card, etc.)
- Data display (Tables, Charts, Lists)
- Forms and validation
- Navigation and layout
- Marketing and landing pages
- Admin dashboards
- Settings and preferences

## For AI Agents
Read CLAUDE.md first for complete instructions on:
- Code conventions and patterns
- Component structure
- API design
- Testing approaches
- Common tasks
